name: BNBClaw
description: AI agent that maximizes BNB utility on Binance — auto-earn, trading, hedging, and reward accumulation. Never sells BNB, only accumulates. Set up everything via Telegram chat.

binance_api_key.description: Binance API key (enable spot + futures trade; disable withdraw). Can also be set via /setup in Telegram.

binance_api_secret.description: Binance API secret. Can also be set via /setup in Telegram.

usdt_floor.description: Minimum USDT balance — agent stops trading below this (0–100,000)

risk_per_trade.description: Fraction of available USDT per trade (0.01–0.20)

bnb_buy_threshold.description: Accumulated short profits (USDT) before auto-buying BNB (5–10,000)
